children.text: “CITES” means the Convention on International Trade in Endangered Species of Wild Fauna and Flora, signed on , and its appendices;March 3, 1973

“conservation” means the use of all methods and procedures necessary to bring rhinoceros and tigers to the point at which there are sufficient populations to ensure that those species do not become extinct, including all activities associated with scientific resource management, such as research, census, law enforcement, habitat protection, acquisition, and management, propagation, live trapping, and transportation;
“Fund” means the the account established by division A, section 101(e), title I of under the heading “” [];1Public Law 105–27716 U.S.C. 4246So in original.1multinational species conservation fund
“Secretary” means the Secretary of the Interior;
“Administrator” means the Administrator of the Agency for International Development; and

children.label: A
children.text: an individual, corporation, partnership, trust, association, or other private entity;

children.text: any State, municipality, or political subdivision of a State; or

children.text: a State, municipality, or political subdivision of a State; or

children.label: D
children.text: any other entity subject to the jurisdiction of the United States.
